overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains a presence on Mastodon, LinkedIn, and Bluesky, focusing on research related to social media analysis, disinformation, and computational social science. LinkedIn has the highest follower count, while engagement varies across platforms. The content revolves around research publications, grant announcements, conference presentations, and job/research opportunities.

contentThemes.description: Announcements of new research papers and publications related to social media analysis and information operations.
Discussion and opportunities related to computational methods for studying social phenomena.
Content focused on detecting and analyzing disinformation campaigns and coordinated inauthentic behavior.
Posts advertising job openings, postdoctoral positions, and research opportunities in the field.

recommendations: Increase cross-promotion of content across platforms to maximize reach.
Engage more actively with comments and replies to foster community interaction.
Use more visuals (images, videos) to enhance content appeal.

platformInsights.bluesky: Bluesky is used to share research publications, conference announcements, and research opportunities. Reposts indicate a decent level of community engagement.
platformInsights.mastodon: Mastodon posts focus on updates about research tools and methodological discussions. Engagement is relatively lower compared to other platforms.
platformInsights.linkedin: LinkedIn is primarily used for professional announcements such as grant awards and job postings. It sees the highest level of likes and comments.

topPerformingContent.content: Excited to announce that our research team has been awarded a new grant to study information operations across social media platforms.

Now hiring: Two postdoctoral researchers to join our team working on computational methods for social media analysis. Background in data science, computational social science, or related fields preferred.
Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
